method_summary: Applying dynamic short convolutions to key, query, and value representations in Transformers using custom Triton kernels
key_innovation: Dynamic short convolutions that adaptively improve Transformer performance

key_results.compute_advantage: 1.33× when applied to key, query, and value vectors; 1.60× when added after every linear layer

title: Dynamic Short Convolutions Improve Transformers
